case_title: VIGILANT INSURANCE COMPANY VS GRANITE EXCAVATION & DEMOLITION, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,272.74 FILED BY VIGILANT INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GRANITE EXCAVATION & DEMOLITION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VIGILANT INSURANCE COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GRANITE EXCAVATION & DEMOLITION, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-09-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-26-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
